name: Baked Lobster
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Remove any tomalley (green liver) from the lobsters and mash it, reserving some for later use.
3. Place the lobsters, split side up, in a large, flat baking pan.
4. In a bowl, combine crushed crackers, 1/4 cup of melted butter, Worcestershire sauce, and white wine.
5. Add the reserved tomalley to the mixture.
6. Lightly spoon the mixture into the lobster cavities.
7. Sprinkle the exposed meat of each lobster with more melted butter.
8. Bake uncovered for 35 to 40 minutes.
9. Sprinkle the lobsters with paprika and parsley before serving, alongside additional melted butter.
